title: Submit CV
description: Applicants can submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.

title: View and Edit CV
description: Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.

title: Answer Screening Questions
description: Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.

title: Get Rating for CV
description: Applicants receive a rating for their CV based on the similarity between the applicant's CV and the job requirements.

title: Parse CV
description: The system uses natural language processing (NLP) to parse the CV and extract key information.

title: Compare CV with Job Requirements
description: The system compares the extracted information from the CV with the job requirements specified by the recruiter.

title: Determine Similarity
description: The system uses cosine similarity and Jaccard similarity to determine the alignment between the extracted information and the job requirements.

title: Validate Applicant Responses
description: Applicant responses are verified and graded by comparing them to an expert-generated model.

title: Score Applicant Responses
description: Applicant responses are scored by ChatGPT.

title: Generate Percentage-Based Result
description: The system generates a percentage-based result that represents the applicant's overall suitability for the role.
